basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning.

work.summary: Research intern working on natural language processing and machine learning projects.
Research intern advised by Zifei Shan.
Research intern advised by Prof. Yu Cheng.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.summary: Discovering and analyzing the universal truthfulness hyperplane within large language models
